researchResults.title: Pickle Robot to share lessons learned from taking robots out of the lab and into the field
researchResults.description:
At the Robotics Summit, Pickle Robot's founder and CTO will break down the lessons it learned in making warehouse robots commercially viable.

The post Pickle Robot to share lessons learned from taking robots out of the lab and into the field appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Transitive Robotics announces Transitive 2.0 open-source robotics framework
researchResults.description:
Transitive 2.0 adds ClickHouse, Grafana, and Alertmanager, offering advanced storage and monitoring to help scale growing robot fleets.

The post Transitive Robotics announces Transitive 2.0 open-source robotics framework appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Locus Robotics launches Locus Array for fully autonomous fulfillment
researchResults.description:
Locus Array is designed to complete fulfillment workflows without manual intervention and is already in use at DHL and other customers.

The post Locus Robotics launches Locus Array for fully autonomous fulfillment appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: AGIBOT launches Genie Studio Agent zero-code application platform for robots
researchResults.description:
AGIBOT said it designed Genie Studio Agent to provide a full lifecycle software infrastructure, from development to deployment.

The post AGIBOT launches Genie Studio Agent zero-code application platform for robots appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Binghamton researchers create robotic guide dogs that walk — and talk
researchResults.description:
Scientists at Binghamton University have developed a robotic guide dog that uses large language models to communicate in real time with the visually impaired.

The post Binghamton researchers create robotic guide dogs that walk — and talk appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: OpenAI has bought AI personal finance startup Hiro
researchResults.description: The acquisition indicates a capability that OpenAI is building into ChatGPT: financial planning.

researchResults.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch signals IPO readiness as AI agents fuel revenue surge
researchResults.description: While many startups founded prior to the emergence of ChatGPT are struggling to position themselves for the AI era, Vercel, a 10-year-old dev tool and website hosting platform, is benefiting from the explosion of AI-generated apps and agents.

researchResults.title: Stanford report highlights growing disconnect between AI insiders and everyone else
researchResults.description: Stanford’s latest AI Index shows a widening gap between experts and the public, with rising anxiety over jobs, healthcare, and the economy.

researchResults.title: NVIDIA's CEO Projects $1 Trillion in AI Chip Sales as New Computing Era Begins
Microsoft is working on yet another OpenClaw-like agent
researchResults.description: The new features would be geared toward enterprise customers, with better security controls than the famously risky open source OpenClaw agent.
